steps.t: Lóburdith has helped you complete the healing concoction needed to save Mírthar. Hurry back and give him the medicine.
Mírthar's body appears lifeless when you arrived with the healing concoction. Inspect him to learn any more that you can.
You found Mírthar's scholar's mark when inspecting him. Bring it to the scholar Serâna in Sul Madásh, she would want to know of his fate.
